input_data.question: I want to analyze how the Signal-to-Noise Quality Indicator (SNQI) varies across different weather conditions. For each weather condition, give weather condition name, the average SNQI, the median SNQI, and count how many analyzable signals there are. Sort the result by average SNQI in descending order.

output_data.final_sql:
SELECT 
    o.weathprofile AS weather_condition,
    AVG(s.snrratio) AS avg_snqi,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY s.snrratio) AS median_snqi,
    COUNT(*) AS analyzable_signals_count
FROM observatories o
JOIN telescopes t ON o.observstation = t.observstation
JOIN signals s ON t.telescregistry = s.telescref
WHERE s.snrratio IS NOT NULL 
  AND s.snrratio BETWEEN 0 AND 50
GROUP BY o.weathprofile
ORDER BY avg_snqi DESC;
